title: 100 Pack Cable Ties White, 6 inch Zip Ties, 3.6mm x 150mm Tidy Wires Long 40lbs Tensile Strength with UV Resistant, Nylon Plastic Self Locking Large Heavy Duty Cable Wrap for Home Workshop and Garden
features: ✅【Size and Quantity】 6in Nylon Cable Ties, White, 3.6*150mm, 100 pieces per pack, Tensile Strength: 40lbs(18kg)

✅【High Quality Material】 It is made of the latest PA66 nylon material with a tensile strength of 40lbs(18kg), strong and not easy to age, active working temperature: -25°C to 85°C, strong weather resistance and high temperature resistance. It can be used outdoors in direct sunlight
✅【Self - Locking Design】 It can fix the object in the right position very securely, and with each pull it becomes tighter, so it is easy to handle and the jamming is prevented

✅【Widely Used】 This multifunctional cable tie is widely used for organizing cables, gardening, attaching bicycles and closing suitcases. It is very suitable for organizing at home, in the office, in the garage, while traveling and in workshops. If you want to arrange different wires, zippers and other accessories, this is a good choice

✅【Quality Assurance】 The cable tie is pressed by exquisite technology, the surface of which is smooth. The zipper teeth are burr-free, so the cable tie is easy to tighten. We offer high quality cable ties and star service for you. If you are not satisfied with the product, feel free to contact us. Thank you for choosing us
description: About Our Products: ☑1. We promise to always offer high quality nylon cable ties to all our honored customers. ☑2. You will receive 100 piece per pack (6 inch White nylon cable ties). Premium Cable Ties Description: ☑1. Cable material: Nylon PA66 ☑2. Tensile strength: 18kg ☑3. Temperature resistance: -25 °C to 85 °C. ☑4. Color: White ☑5. Length: 150mm (6 Inches) ☑6. Width: 3.6mm(0.14 Inches) ☑7. Thickness: 1.2mm(0.05 Inches) ☑8. Quantity: 100 pieces per pack Special Features of Cable Ties: ☑1. Made of new and high quality nylon, high strength, anti-aging, durability and strong carrying capacity! ☑2. The cable tie is thickened to increase the tensile strength. Tensile strength can reach up to 18kg without fear of breaking or loosening! ☑3. The self - locking nylon cable tie can meet different requirements in work and life for a long time, the demanding industrial and construction applications, and solve all the problems for you!
